Common TOS To Be Aware Of
Facebook Terms of Service and GDPR
Common Policies To Be Aware
Of In The Facebook Ads Terms
of Service
Full Facebook Ads TOS can be found
here: https://www.facebook.com/policies/ads/ and you should be sure to read
through and comply with them all but here are a few that commonly catch marketers
out and could cause your ads to be disapproved. If you do have ads disapproved and
you don't feel like they are violating the terms of service, you'll see a red "appeal"
button when you click to edit the disapproved ad (or click here
https://www.facebook.com/help/contact/1582364792025146) and you can state your
case to Facebook there. To get the best response from customer service, be polite
and ask for an explanation on why your ad was disapproved.
If you need to contact Facebook support, you can do so
here: https://www.facebook.com/business/resources at the bottom of the page.
Personal Attributes
https://www.facebook.com/policies/ads/prohibited_content/personal_attributes
Adult/Sexually Suggestive Content
https://www.facebook.com/policies/ads/prohibited_content/adult_content
Discriminatory Practices
https://www.facebook.com/policies/ads/prohibited_content/discriminatory_practices
Misleading/False Content
https://www.facebook.com/policies/ads/prohibited_content/misleading_or_false_content
Personal Health

you feel like you need some help, reach
out to one of the crew inside the
Facebook group. Or sign up for one of
the Q&A calls. We've got your back!
